{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Personnel",
  "description": "G.U Ebeco Industries Limited -&nbsp;We specialized in office, kitchen bedroom and hotel furnishing, with total recognition to the potential of input of clients in the building of aesthetic furniture.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Personnel

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative, data-driven, and highly organized Social Media Personnel to oversee and execute our social media strategy.
	This role is responsible for building brand awareness, engaging audiences, driving traffic, and supporting business growth through effective content planning, campaign execution, and performance analysis across all major social platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with business goals.
	Define KPIs such as engagement rate, reach, conversions, and follower growth.
	Plan and manage social media calendars across platforms (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, TikTok, etc.).
	Stay up-to-date with platform trends, algorithm changes, and emerging tools.
	Ensure all content aligns with brand voice, tone, and guidelines.
	Generate regular reports with actionable insights and recommendations.
	Time management and organization
	Create, curate, and publish high-quality, engaging content (text, images, videos, reels, stories).
	Identify potential risks and escalate appropriately.
	Foster a positive and engaging online community.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in social media management.
	Proven track record of growing and managing social media accounts.
	Strong understanding of social media platforms, trends, and best practices.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Preferable Male.


Skills:


	Experience with social advertising (Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Instagram Ads).
	Basic graphic design or video editing skills.
	Knowledge of SEO and content marketing principles.
	Strong creativity and attention to detail.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualifiedcandidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@guebecoindustries.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Social Media Personnel Job at G.U Ebeco Industries Limited




        
    

        
        G.U Ebeco Industries Limited - We specialized in office, kitchen bedroom and hotel furnishing, with total recognition to the potential of input of clients in the building of aesthetic furniture.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Personnel

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a creative, data-driven, and highly organized Social Media Personnel to oversee and execute our social media strategy.
	This role is responsible for building brand awareness, engaging audiences, driving traffic, and supporting business growth through effective content planning, campaign execution, and performance analysis across all major social platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with business goals.
	Define KPIs such as engagement rate, reach, conversions, and follower growth.
	Plan and manage social media calendars across platforms (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, TikTok, etc.).
	Stay up-to-date with platform trends, algorithm changes, and emerging tools.
	Ensure all content aligns with brand voice, tone, and guidelines.
	Generate regular reports with actionable insights and recommendations.
	Time management and organization
	Create, curate, and publish high-quality, engaging content (text, images, videos, reels, stories).
	Identify potential risks and escalate appropriately.
	Foster a positive and engaging online community.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in social media management.
	Proven track record of growing and managing social media accounts.
	Strong understanding of social media platforms, trends, and best practices.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Preferable Male.


Skills:


	Experience with social advertising (Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Instagram Ads).
	Basic graphic design or video editing skills.
	Knowledge of SEO and content marketing principles.
	Strong creativity and attention to detail.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualifiedcandidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Social Media Manager Job at House of Maryjane




        
    

        
        House of Maryjane is a unique brand that offers professional fashion designing services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Festac, Lagos

Job Summary


	We are currently looking for competent and hard working Social media manager to handle all our social media platforms


Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Deliberate planning, strategy and goal setting
	Scheduling meetings and appointment
	Development of brand awareness and online reputation
	Content management (on all social media platforms)
	SEO (search engine optimization) and generation of inbound traffic
	Cultivation of leads and sales
	Reputation management: Must bea highly motivated, creative individual with experience and a passion for connecting with current and future customers.
	Have good knowledge in using capcut,Ai and other editing tools
	Must be able to work without supervision
	Must be computer literate.


Requirements


	SSCE / OND / HND / BSc. Degree.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more inquiries, call: 08154113937.

title: Job Vacancies at Peopleplusng
content:
We provide exceptional HR support that empowers businesses to succeed. We're committed to delivering tailored solutions that meet the unique needs of each client, from recruitment and talent management to compliance and risk management.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Client Relations and Sales Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking to hire a proactive and resourceful Client Relationship & Sales Officer.
	The ideal candidate will ensure clients receive exceptional service while driving sales growth.
	This role requires building and managing strong client relationships, generating new business opportunities, and achieving measurable sales results in the wellness industry.


Main Duties and Responsibilities


	Manage all calls, emails, and messages across all communication channels.
	Identify and assess client needs to deliver excellent service and satisfaction.
	Actively follow up on sales while identifying new business opportunities.
	Build and maintain strong, trusted relationships with clients through consistent and engaging communication.
	Present, promote, and sell services to existing and prospective clients.
	Provide accurate and complete information using appropriate methods and tools.
	Handle client concerns and complaints, provide timely solutions, and ensure follow-up to resolution.
	Maintain accurate records of client interactions, sales activities, and transactions.


Required Skills and Qualifications


	Minimum of a Bachelor’s Degree in Communication, Business, or a relevant field.
	2–3 years of proven experience in sales, client service, or relationship management.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Strong organizational skills with attention to detail.
	Demonstrated sales drive with strong persuasion and negotiation skills.
	Client-focused and result-oriented mindset.
	Genuine interest in the wellness industry.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter outlining their relevant experience to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Accountant

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Accountant with strong inventory management experience to join our healthcare/aesthetic facility.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for financial reporting, cost control, and accurate inventory tracking to support operational efficiency and compliance.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, reports, and reconciliations in line with accounting standards.
	Manage accounts payable and receivable, ensuring timely processing of transactions.
	Monitor and control inventory accounting, including stock valuation, tracking, and reconciliation with physical inventory.
	Implement and maintain effective inventory control systems to prevent loss, wastage, or discrepancies.
	Track cost of medical supplies, aesthetic products, and equipment, ensuring proper cost allocation.
	Support budgeting and forecasting processes, providing insights on operational and inventory costs.
	Conduct periodic stock audits and work closely with operations/procurement teams to ensure accuracy.
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations, financial policies, and healthcare industry requirements.
	Prepare financial statements and assist with audits.
	Utilize accounting software and systems to maintain data accuracy and generate reports.
	Identify opportunities for cost savings and process improvements.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	2–4years of experience in accounting, preferably within healthcare or a related industry.
	Strong knowledge of inventory accounting and stock management processes.
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.
	Good understanding of financial reporting standards and tax regulations.
	High level of accuracy, integrity, and attention to detail.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA part-qualified or in view) is an advantage.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter outlining their relevant experience to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) Nurse

Job Location: Abuja  (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a qualified and compassionate Registered Nurse to join our healthcare/aesthetic facility.
	The ideal candidate will provide high-quality patient care, support clinical and aesthetic procedures, and ensure compliance with established healthcare standards and best practices.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide professional nursing care to patients before, during, and after medical and aesthetic procedures
	Assist medical practitioners during aesthetic treatments and minor clinical procedures
	Monitor patient conditions, vital signs, and recovery progress
	Educate patients on pre- and post-treatment care, ensuring proper understanding and compliance
	Maintain accurate patient records and documentation in line with clinical and regulatory standards
	Ensure strict adherence to infection prevention, hygiene, and safety protocols
	Prepare, sterilize, and manage clinical equipment and treatment rooms
	Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
	Deliver excellent patient care and ensure a positive patient experience
	Ensure compliance with healthcare regulations, ethical standards, and internal policies
	Support day-to-day clinical operations within the facility


Requirements


	Registered Nurse (RN) qualification with a valid practicing license
	2–4years of clinical experience in a healthcare setting
	Strong knowledge of patient care standards and clinical procedures
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	High level of professionalism, empathy, and attention to detail
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
	Experience in aesthetic nursing is an added advantage.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter outlining their relevant experience to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Operation Manager",
  "description": "Dwellion Design was founded in 2017, we have been motivated by a desire to better serve our clients and work closely with our clients to create personalized, stress-free design experiences, helping families and businesses express themselves through their unique spaces

Dwellion Design delivers strategic interior design planning and environmental branding to transform hotels, restaurants, luxury multi-family properties, retail, commercial spaces, and more.

We always begin with you, your interests, and your requirements.Then we consider the ideal project to bring your ideal new house to life.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Operation Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Chevron-Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Plan, coordinate, and supervise project operations across multiple projects.
	Develop project schedules, work plans, and resource allocation strategies.
	Ensure compliance with approved project drawings, specifications, and contract requirements and regulatory requirements.
	Prepare and review structural designs and calculations for buildings and civil works.
	Interpret architectural drawings and convert them into structural engineering designs.
	Develop structural drawings for foundations, beams, slabs, columns, and reinforcement detailing.
	Prepare detailed Bills of Quantities (BOQ) based on architectural and engineering drawings.
	Support procurement by preparing material specifications and quantity requirements.
	Review supplier and subcontractor quotations against BOQ specifications.
	Track project expenditures and provide cost performance reports.
	Oversee site teams including engineers, supervisors, and subcontractors.
	Ensure adherence to project schedules and productivity targets.
	Ensure all project activities meet company quality standards and industry regulations.
	Enforce health and safety policies on all project sites.
	Conduct risk assessments and ensure mitigation measures are implemented.
	Prepare and present technical and operational project progress reports to management.
	Coordinate with architects, engineers, consultants, and clients.
	Track key performance indicators related to cost, schedule, and quality.
	Provide regular updates on project status, risks, and mitigation plans.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;emilyadebayo@dwelliondesign.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Project Operation Manager Job at Dwellion Design




        
    

        
        Dwellion Design was founded in 2017, we have been motivated by a desire to better serve our clients and work closely with our clients to create personalized, stress-free design experiences, helping families and businesses express themselves through their unique spaces

Dwellion Design delivers strategic interior design planning and environmental branding to transform hotels, restaurants, luxury multi-family properties, retail, commercial spaces, and more.

We always begin with you, your interests, and your requirements.Then we consider the ideal project to bring your ideal new house to life.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Operation Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Chevron-Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Plan, coordinate, and supervise project operations across multiple projects.
	Develop project schedules, work plans, and resource allocation strategies.
	Ensure compliance with approved project drawings, specifications, and contract requirements and regulatory requirements.
	Prepare and review structural designs and calculations for buildings and civil works.
	Interpret architectural drawings and convert them into structural engineering designs.
	Develop structural drawings for foundations, beams, slabs, columns, and reinforcement detailing.
	Prepare detailed Bills of Quantities (BOQ) based on architectural and engineering drawings.
	Support procurement by preparing material specifications and quantity requirements.
	Review supplier and subcontractor quotations against BOQ specifications.
	Track project expenditures and provide cost performance reports.
	Oversee site teams including engineers, supervisors, and subcontractors.
	Ensure adherence to project schedules and productivity targets.
	Ensure all project activities meet company quality standards and industry regulations.
	Enforce health and safety policies on all project sites.
	Conduct risk assessments and ensure mitigation measures are implemented.
	Prepare and present technical and operational project progress reports to management.
	Coordinate with architects, engineers, consultants, and clients.
	Track key performance indicators related to cost, schedule, and quality.
	Provide regular updates on project status, risks, and mitigation plans.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head, Revenue Assurrance",
  "description": "Unified Payment is a fast-leading financial technology company that provides seamless, secure, and efficient digital payment solutions. We enable businesses and individuals to send, receive, and manage payments across multiple channels through a single, integrated platform, driving financial inclusion, operational efficiency, and innovation in the digital payments ecosystem.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head, Revenue Assurrance

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Objectives


	The Head, Revenue Assurance is responsible for providing independent assurance that all revenue-related processes, systems, and controls across the organization are efficient, accurate, and compliant with internal policies and regulatory standards.
	The role focuses on identifying revenue leakages, assessing the adequacy of revenue controls, and recommending improvements to strengthen financial integrity and operational efficiency.
	The incumbent will lead revenue-focused audit engagements and collaborate closely with Finance and Accounts, Operations, IT teams and other stakeholders to ensure transparent and reliable revenue reporting.


Duties &amp; / Responsibilities


	Lead and execute audits and reviews focused on revenue generation, recognition, billing, and collection processes. ? Verify the accuracy and completeness of receivables vis-&agrave;-vis collections, Scheme Receivables - Amount due to UP as licensed Acquirer for both domestic and international transactions (Visa, MasterCard, Amex, CUP, Payattitude, and others).
	Verify the completeness and accuracy of file generated on approved transactions processed for local settlement and secondary settlement.
	Quality checks to forestall duplicate or incomplete submission of clearing files to the different schemes in specified formats and within defined time windows for each scheme
	Identify revenue leakages, control gaps, and process inefficiencies; recommend and monitor corrective actions.
	Assess compliance with internal revenue policies, accounting standards (IFRS, GAAP), and regulatory requirements.
	Monitor revenue risks and emerging control issues that may impact financial reporting accuracy.
	Ensure audit recommendations are implemented effectively and within agreed timelines.
	Review revenue-related systems (billing, ERP, POS, etc.) for data integrity and control effectiveness.
	Collaborate with IT Audit to ensure system configurations support accurate revenue capture and reporting.


Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or related field.
	Professional certification required: ACA, ACCA, CPA, CISA, CIA, or equivalent.


Experience:


	Minimum of 10 years of relevant experience, with at least 5 years in audit leadership roles focused on revenue assurance, risk management, or financial controls.
	Experience in banking, telecommunications, insurance, utilities, or large corporate audit environments preferred.
	Strong understanding of revenue recognition principles, internal controls, and riskbased auditing methodologies.
	Proven ability to use audit management and data analytics tools (e.g., ACL, IDEA, Power BI, SQL).


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to:&nbsp;mercy.joseph@up-ng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Head, Revenue Assurrance Job at Unified Payment




        
    

        
        Unified Payment is a fast-leading financial technology company that provides seamless, secure, and efficient digital payment solutions. We enable businesses and individuals to send, receive, and manage payments across multiple channels through a single, integrated platform, driving financial inclusion, operational efficiency, and innovation in the digital payments ecosystem.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head, Revenue Assurrance

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Objectives
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Head, Revenue Assurance is responsible for providing independent assurance that all revenue-related processes, systems, and controls across the organization are efficient, accurate, and compliant with internal policies and regulatory standards.
	The role focuses on identifying revenue leakages, assessing the adequacy of revenue controls, and recommending improvements to strengthen financial integrity and operational efficiency.
	The incumbent will lead revenue-focused audit engagements and collaborate closely with Finance and Accounts, Operations, IT teams and other stakeholders to ensure transparent and reliable revenue reporting.


Duties & / Responsibilities


	Lead and execute audits and reviews focused on revenue generation, recognition, billing, and collection processes. ? Verify the accuracy and completeness of receivables vis-à-vis collections, Scheme Receivables - Amount due to UP as licensed Acquirer for both domestic and international transactions (Visa, MasterCard, Amex, CUP, Payattitude, and others).
	Verify the completeness and accuracy of file generated on approved transactions processed for local settlement and secondary settlement.
	Quality checks to forestall duplicate or incomplete submission of clearing files to the different schemes in specified formats and within defined time windows for each scheme
	Identify revenue leakages, control gaps, and process inefficiencies; recommend and monitor corrective actions.
	Assess compliance with internal revenue policies, accounting standards (IFRS, GAAP), and regulatory requirements.
	Monitor revenue risks and emerging control issues that may impact financial reporting accuracy.
	Ensure audit recommendations are implemented effectively and within agreed timelines.
	Review revenue-related systems (billing, ERP, POS, etc.) for data integrity and control effectiveness.
	Collaborate with IT Audit to ensure system configurations support accurate revenue capture and reporting.


Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or related field.
	Professional certification required: ACA, ACCA, CPA, CISA, CIA, or equivalent.


Experience:


	Minimum of 10 years of relevant experience, with at least 5 years in audit leadership roles focused on revenue assurance, risk management, or financial controls.
	Experience in banking, telecommunications, insurance, utilities, or large corporate audit environments preferred.
	Strong understanding of revenue recognition principles, internal controls, and riskbased auditing methodologies.
	Proven ability to use audit management and data analytics tools (e.g., ACL, IDEA, Power BI, SQL).


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
